evals.prompt: How do I set up Swagger/OpenAPI in Spring Boot 3?
evals.expected_output: Use springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui. Use @Operation and @ApiResponse annotations. Enable spring.mvc.problem-details.enabled=true for RFC 7807 error responses.

evals.prompt: How should I version my Spring Boot REST API?
evals.expected_output: Prefer URI versioning (/api/v1/). Header versioning is hard to test and cache. Use @Deprecated + OpenAPI deprecation flag for old versions.

evals.prompt: How do I return typed responses instead of Map<String, Object> in Spring Boot?
evals.expected_output: Define dedicated DTO record classes for all responses. Never return raw Map<K,V> as it's untyped and bypasses OpenAPI schema generation.

should_not_trigger: How do I implement JWT in Spring Boot?
How do I write a NestJS controller?
How do I set up Swagger in NestJS?
